name: tier-b/ruby/01-convention-multi-gemspec
description: Convention-only monorepo: root Gemfile references 2 subdirectories via gemspec path: lines, plus 2 gems/<name>/<name>.gemspec files. Evidence type is convention (NOT workspace_declaration) per Ruby's lower-confidence detection.

manifests.gems/foo/foo.gemspec:
Gem::Specification.new do |spec|
  spec.name        = "foo"
  spec.version     = "0.1.0"
  spec.authors     = ["Example"]
  spec.summary     = "Foo gem"
  spec.files       = []
  spec.require_paths = ["lib"]
end
manifests.gems/bar/bar.gemspec:
Gem::Specification.new do |spec|
  spec.name        = "bar"
  spec.version     = "0.1.0"
  spec.authors     = ["Example"]
  spec.summary     = "Bar gem"
  spec.files       = []
  spec.require_paths = ["lib"]
end
